changeSet.author: aicoach

column.name: notes
column.value: Peak base week — longest run to date

column.name: notes
column.value: CROWN JEWEL WEEK — peak training load

column.name: notes
column.value: Controlled descent from peak — lighter strength

column.name: notes
column.value: Taper — last quality session this week

column.name: notes
column.value: ZAGORI TeRA RACE WEEK — 05:00 Saturday start

changeSet.author: aicoach
changeSet.sql: UPDATE strava_tokens st SET internal_athlete_id = a.id FROM athletes a WHERE a.strava_athlete_id = st.athlete_id
UPDATE strava_activities sa SET internal_athlete_id = a.id FROM athletes a WHERE a.strava_athlete_id = sa.athlete_id
